capabilities.name: smugchunks

capabilities.description: Detects HTTP request smuggling vulnerabilities using chunked transfer encoding.

parameters.name: CHARIOT_USER_AGENT
parameters.description: Headers to send with the request

capabilities.name: linux-ad-umber-check
capabilities.title: Linux Umber AD Domain Check
capabilities.description: Performs Active Directory security checks using Umber. Evaluates domain configuration against security rules and best practices. Supports filtering by specific rules or categories to focus on particular security concerns.

parameters.name: Rules
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of specific rules to run (e.g., 'rule1,rule2'). If empty, all rules are run unless Category is specified.

parameters.name: Category
parameters.description: Category of rules to run (e.g., 'passwords', 'privileges'). If empty, all categories are run unless Rules is specified.

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Domain controller address. If empty, auto-discovered via DNS.

capabilities.name: cve-researcher-agent
capabilities.title: CVE Researcher Agent
capabilities.description: Query CISA KEV for CVEs, search for existing templates, and run vulnerability research pipeline

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back for CVEs

parameters.name: run_pipeline
parameters.description: Run the full CVE research pipeline

parameters.name: run_validation
parameters.description: Run the full validation pipeline for each child account

parameters.name: create_linear_ticket
parameters.description: Create a linear ticket for new vulnerabilities

capabilities.name: ldap-null-bind
capabilities.title: LDAP NULL Bind
capabilities.description: Checks LDAP servers for NULL bind authentication.

capabilities.description: Generate Nuclei templates from CVE IDs using AI-powered research and template generation

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: Attack goal for adaptive attack phase

parameters.name: config_file
parameters.description: Full Augustus YAML config file to override all other parameters (generators, probes, detectors, etc.)

capabilities.name: reverse-whois

capabilities.name: linux-ad-smbsigning-dc
capabilities.title: Linux AD Domain Controller SMB Signing Check
capabilities.description: Executes NetExec (nxc) SMB signing check against target domain controllers to identify potential SMB signing vulnerabilities. This capability checks the SMB signing configuration of domain controllers to determine if they are vulnerable to SMB signing attacks. Supports both DNS-based discovery (external assessments) and credential-enhanced discovery (internal assessments) for maximum accuracy.

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: Domain username for enhanced DC discovery (optional - enables 99%+ accuracy vs 85-90% with DNS-only)

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Domain password for enhanced DC discovery (optional - used with Username for authenticated LDAP queries)

capabilities.name: linux-gitlab-pat-scanner

parameters.name: GitlabToken
parameters.description: GitLab access token used to perform search across projects

parameters.name: NoVerifySSL
parameters.description: Disable SSL certificate verification (use with caution for self-signed certificates)

capabilities.name: cve-2025-55182
capabilities.title: CVE-2025-55182
capabilities.description: Scans webpages for CVE-2025-55182

capabilities.name: windows-web-nuclei
capabilities.title: Windows Web Nuclei
capabilities.description: Performs automated web application vulnerability scanning using Nuclei's extensive template library. Identifies security vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, exposed services, and potential attack vectors across web applications and services within the client's internal environment. Features comprehensive vulnerability detection including CVEs, exposed panels, default credentials, and security misconfigurations.

parameters.name: TemplateFilter
parameters.description: (Optional) Filter templates by tags (e.g., cves,exposures,network). Leave empty to run all templates. Common tags: cves, exposures, exposed-panels, default-logins, misconfiguration, vulnerabilities, network, ssl, dns

parameters.name: EnableAutoScan
parameters.description: Enable automatic scan mode for comprehensive coverage

capabilities.name: aurelian-azure-find-secrets

capabilities.description: Enumerates Azure resources via Resource Graph, extracts content likely to contain hardcoded secrets (VM user data, web app settings, automation variables, storage blobs, container env vars, Cosmos DB, APIM named values, Key Vault, and 30+ other sources), and scans with Titus.

parameters.name: subscription-ids
parameters.description: Azure subscription ID(s) or 'all' to enumerate all accessible subscriptions

parameters.name: disabled-titus-rules
parameters.description: Rule IDs to exclude from scanning

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Validate detected secrets against their source APIs

parameters.name: ignore-file
parameters.description: Path to gitignore-style file for skipping paths; when empty uses a default list

parameters.name: ruleset
parameters.description: Titus ruleset to apply; empty string disables ruleset filtering

parameters.name: resource-id
parameters.description: Azure resource ID(s) to scan directly, skipping enumeration

parameters.name: max-cosmos-doc-size
parameters.description: Max individual Cosmos document size in bytes

parameters.name: max-cosmos-doc-scan
parameters.description: Max total Cosmos documents to scan per container

capabilities.name: burp-dast-scan

capabilities.description: initiates a single Burp DAST scan for a WebApplication target

capabilities.name: burpsuite-internal

capabilities.description: scans Burp Enterprise internal sites and retrieves vulnerability data

capabilities.name: secrets
capabilities.title: secrets
capabilities.description: scans repositories for sensitive information and secrets with titus

parameters.name: validation
parameters.description: Validate discovered secrets against their source APIs (defaults to true)

parameters.name: rules
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of rule IDs to scan for (defaults to all rules)

parameters.name: full_history
parameters.description: Scan full git history vs only HEAD (defaults to true)

capabilities.description: Performs automated web application vulnerability scanning using Nuclei's extensive template library. Identifies security vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, exposed services, and potential attack vectors across web applications and services within the client's internal environment. Features comprehensive vulnerability detection including CVEs, exposed panels, default credentials, and security misconfigurations.

parameters.name: TemplateFilter
parameters.description: (Optional) Filter templates by tags (e.g., cves,exposures,network). Leave empty to run all templates. Common tags: cves, exposures, exposed-panels, default-logins, misconfiguration, vulnerabilities, network, ssl, dns

parameters.name: EnableAutoScan
parameters.description: Enable automatic scan mode for comprehensive coverage

capabilities.name: windows-ad-pingcastle
capabilities.title: Windows AD PingCastle
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive Active Directory security posture assessment using PingCastle's advanced health check algorithms. Analyzes AD configuration, identifies security vulnerabilities, weak authentication policies, privilege escalation paths, and provides detailed remediation recommendations with risk scoring across the client's domain infrastructure.

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Specify a domain controller to connect to

capabilities.name: windows-network-nmap-s3support
capabilities.title: Windows Network Nmap with S3 Support
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive network reconnaissance and port scanning from Windows environments using Nmap. Identifies open ports, running services, service versions, and potential vulnerabilities across target hosts within the client's network infrastructure. Includes service detection and vulnerability scanning capabilities to map the network attack surface.

parameters.name: custom_ports
parameters.description: Custom port specification when ports is set to 'Custom'. Examples: '80,443', '1-1000', '22,80-90,443'

parameters.name: scan_flags
parameters.description: Additional nmap flags for scanning options. The default value includes service detection, script scanning with default and vuln groups, and skipping Ping for checking if the target host responds.

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output format for Nmap results. Choose from xml (structured XML), text (normal text output), or grep (greppable format).

capabilities.description: Detect CVE-2025-53770 (Microsoft SharePoint Server ToolPane Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution) using Metasploit.

capabilities.name: linux-network-nerva
capabilities.title: Linux Network Nerva Service Scanner
capabilities.description: Identifies services running on open ports using nerva, a fast service fingerprinting tool from Praetorian. Supports numerous protocols including HTTP, SSH, RDP, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SMB, LDAP, Kafka, and more. Accepts host:port pairs as input.

capabilities.name: aurelian-agent
capabilities.title: Cloud Resource Discovery
capabilities.description: Specialized agent that inventories and discovers cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments to map cloud attack surface and identify targets for security assessment

capabilities.name: redirect
capabilities.title: Redirect
capabilities.description: analyzes a website's redirects and extracts associated assets

capabilities.name: mongodb-login

parameters.name: config

capabilities.name: cisco-smart-install
capabilities.title: Cisco Smart Install Scanner
capabilities.description: Identifies Cisco Smart Install endpoints and determines if they speak the Smart Install Protocol. Exposure of SMI to untrusted networks can allow complete compromise of the switch.

capabilities.name: windows-ad-umber-collect
capabilities.title: Windows AD Umber Collect
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive Active Directory enumeration and data collection using umber. Implements a SharpHound-style collection engine that enumerates all AD objects (users, computers, groups, GPOs, OUs, etc.) and collects their properties and relationships. Supports LDAP-only collection or extended collection including network sessions, local group membership, and user rights assignments via RPC.

parameters.name: Domain
parameters.description: Domain where user credentials are valid. If empty, defaults to TargetDomain.

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: Username for authentication. If empty, uses current context.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Password for authentication. Required if Username is specified.

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Domain controller address. If empty, auto-discovered via DNS.

parameters.name: CollectAll
parameters.description: Enable all computer collection methods (sessions, local groups, user rights via RPC). If false, only LDAP collection is performed.

capabilities.description: Submits vulnerability reports to HackerOne bug bounty programs

parameters.name: severity_rating

parameters.name: attachment_s3_keys
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of Guard S3 keys to upload as report attachments

capabilities.name: gato-artifacts

capabilities.description: Scans for hard-coded secrets in GitHub actions artifacts.

capabilities.name: imap-ntlm-info

capabilities.description: Extracts NTLM information from IMAP servers using Nmap's imap-ntlm-info NSE script to identify Windows domain configurations and potential information disclosure vulnerabilities.

capabilities.name: windows-ad-umber-check
capabilities.title: Windows Umber AD Domain Check
capabilities.description: Performs Active Directory security checks using Umber. Evaluates domain configuration against security rules and best practices. Supports filtering by specific rules or categories to focus on particular security concerns.

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: Username for authentication. If empty, uses current context.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Password for authentication. Required if Username is specified.

parameters.name: Rules
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of specific rules to run (e.g., 'rule1,rule2'). If empty, all rules are run unless Category is specified.

capabilities.description: Performs security analysis of Active Directory Group Policy Objects (GPOs) to identify misconfigurations and vulnerabilities. Group3r examines GPO settings, ACLs, script paths, registry modifications, and privilege assignments to discover potential attack vectors, insecure configurations, and opportunities for privilege escalation within the client's AD Group Policy infrastructure.

capabilities.name: aurelian-aws-org-policies

capabilities.description: Enumerates Java RMI registries using Nmap's rmi-dumpregistry NSE script to identify exposed remote objects.

parameters.description: Path to YAML config file for LLM settings

capabilities.name: workflow-generate

capabilities.description: Generate Nuclei detection templates from CVE IDs (2-step: research → generate)

parameters.name: config

parameters.name: output_dir

capabilities.name: ab-benchmark
capabilities.title: Apache Benchmark
capabilities.description: HTTP load testing using Apache Benchmark (ab) against a domain or IP address with verbose output logging

parameters.name: requests
parameters.description: Maximum total number of requests (0 = unlimited, time-based only)

parameters.name: processes
parameters.description: Number of concurrent ab processes to spawn (1–10)

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS, PATCH)

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: Custom HTTP headers, one per line (e.g. Content-Type: application/json)

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Request body to send (requires a non-GET method)

capabilities.name: bulk-action
capabilities.title: Bulk Action
capabilities.description: Apply an action to a bulk selection of items

capabilities.name: snmp-community-strings
capabilities.title: SNMP Community Strings
capabilities.description: Checks SNMP servers for default/weak community strings

parameters.name: VERSION
parameters.description: The version of SNMP (if known). Supplying the version can help reduce duplicates from Metasploit. Options are: (1,2c,all)

capabilities.name: windows-smb-snaffler
capabilities.title: Windows SMB Snaffler
capabilities.description: Discovers and analyzes sensitive files, credentials, and configuration data across SMB network shares in Windows AD environments. Supports running with the current computer/user context (no credentials required on domain-joined machines) or with explicit credentials. Snaffler automatically crawls accessible shares, identifies files containing passwords, API keys, certificates, and other high-value secrets that could be leveraged during lateral movement or privilege escalation attacks.

parameters.name: VerbosityLevel
parameters.description: Level of output verbosity from data (least verbose) to trace (most verbose)

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: Domain username for authentication. If empty, uses the current computer/user context.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Domain user password. Required only if Username is specified.

parameters.name: DomainController
parameters.description: Domain controller to connect to. Useful when auto-discovery fails.

parameters.name: MaxSizeToScan
parameters.description: (Optional) Maximum file size in bytes to scan for content (in bytes). Default: 10MB

parameters.name: MaxThreads
parameters.description: (Optional) Maximum number of concurrent threads to use. Don't set it below 4. Default: 60

parameters.name: TargetHosts
parameters.description: (Optional) Disable AD discovery and scan a list of hosts (e.g. 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.35)

parameters.name: TargetPath
parameters.description: (Optional) Disable AD discovery and scan specific shares (e.g. \\host.lol.domain\share) or folders (e.g. C:\)

parameters.name: OptionalRuleSet
parameters.description: (Optional) Load a custom ZIP file containing a folder with .toml files to use as ruleset instead of the default ones

capabilities.name: brutus
capabilities.title: brutus
capabilities.description: credential testing against network services

parameters.name: usernames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of usernames to test (defaults to brutus-provided list)

parameters.name: passwords
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of passwords to test (defaults to brutus-provided list)

parameters.name: ratelimit
parameters.description: Requests per second, supports fractional values like 0.5 (defaults to unlimited)

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: The protocol to use (defaults to the protocol detected on this port)

capabilities.title: Webpage Secrets
capabilities.description: detection of secrets in webpage responses

capabilities.name: cato-agent

capabilities.name: linux-web-gowitness

capabilities.name: cookie-monster

Identifies open ports across target hosts using SYN/CONNECT scans with configurable port ranges and rate limiting. For combined port scanning, service detection, and DNS resolution, use the Network Recon capability instead.

capabilities.name: aurelian-azure-public-resources

parameters.name: subscription-ids
parameters.description: Azure subscription ID(s) or 'all' to enumerate all accessible subscriptions

parameters.name: template-dir

capabilities.name: asset-analyzer

capabilities.description: Specialized agent that performs deep-dive security analysis of individual assets - maps risks, technologies, relationships, attack paths, and recommends targeted offensive capabilities

capabilities.name: subdomain

capabilities.description: discovered subdomains of a domain using various public APIs

capabilities.name: research-scanner

capabilities.name: discovery-triage-agent

parameters.name: collection-timeout

capabilities.name: linux-network-nmap

capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive network reconnaissance by scanning target hosts to identify open ports, running services, service versions, and potential vulnerabilities. Uses Nmap's powerful scanning engine to map the network attack surface and gather intelligence on exposed services within the client's environment.

parameters.name: custom_ports
parameters.description: Custom port specification when Ports is set to 'Custom'. Examples: '80,443', '1-1000', '22,80-90,443', or '-' for all ports

parameters.name: scan_flags

capabilities.name: aurelian-aws-graph
capabilities.title: AWS Graph Analysis
capabilities.description: Collects AWS IAM data (GAAD, resources, policies), evaluates permissions, and detects privilege escalation paths. Outputs JSON by default; use --neo4j-uri to populate graph database with relationships.

parameters.name: profile-dir
parameters.description: Set to override the default AWS profile directory

parameters.name: opsec_level
parameters.description: Operational security level for AWS operations

parameters.name: org-policies-file
parameters.description: Path to Org Policies JSON file

capabilities.name: caligula-ami
capabilities.title: Caligula AMI
capabilities.description: Scans Amazon Linux AMIs for OS-level vulnerabilities by peeling each AMI's EBS snapshot, extracting the RPM database, and matching against ALAS / EPSS / CISA KEV

parameters.name: kev_only
parameters.description: Only emit findings flagged in CISA KEV

parameters.name: max_ami_size_gb
parameters.description: Skip AMIs whose root volume exceeds this many GB

capabilities.name: constantine
capabilities.title: Constantine
capabilities.description: LLM-powered source code vulnerability scanner

parameters.name: pipeline
parameters.description: Predefined pipeline to run (leave blank for auto-selection based on scan type)

parameters.name: scan_mode
parameters.description: Scan mode: auto (skip when HEAD unchanged, delta-scan when possible), full (entire repo), diff (last_scanned_commit..HEAD only)

parameters.name: custom_pipeline
parameters.description: Custom pipeline YAML file (overrides pipeline param)

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: Goal to inject into all LLM system prompts (e.g. 'Focus on SQL injection vulnerabilities')

capabilities.name: aurelian-azure-list-all
capabilities.title: Azure List All Resources
capabilities.description: List all Azure resources across subscriptions using Azure Resource Graph. Supports scanning specific subscriptions or all accessible subscriptions.

parameters.name: subscription-ids
parameters.description: Azure subscription ID(s) or 'all' to enumerate all accessible subscriptions

capabilities.name: ipmi-hash-extraction
capabilities.title: IPMI Hash Extraction
capabilities.description: Detects vulnerable IPMI interfaces and extracts password hashes from discovered IPMI services.

capabilities.name: linux-ad-certipy
capabilities.title: Linux AD Certipy Certificate Template Vulnerability Scanner
capabilities.description: Executes Certipy to find vulnerable Active Directory Certificate Services (ADCS) certificate templates and outputs results in JSON format. This capability identifies certificate templates that may be vulnerable to various attacks including ESC1, ESC2, ESC3, and other certificate-based privilege escalation techniques. Requires domain credentials and domain controller IP for authenticated enumeration.

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Domain controller IP address or hostname (optional - will auto-discover if not provided)

capabilities.name: aurelian-aws-public-resources
capabilities.title: AWS Public Resources
capabilities.description: Finds publicly accessible AWS resources through policy evaluation, property inspection, and enrichment. Combines resource listing, enrichment, policy fetching, and public access evaluation to identify resources that are exposed to the internet or allow anonymous access.

parameters.name: profile-dir
parameters.description: Set to override the default AWS profile directory

parameters.name: opsec_level
parameters.description: Operational security level for AWS operations

parameters.name: org-policies-file
parameters.description: Path to Org Policies JSON file

capabilities.name: favicon
capabilities.title: Favicon Extractor
capabilities.description: searches for websites with matching favicons using Shodan

capabilities.name: aurelian-azure-subdomain-takeover
capabilities.title: Azure Subdomain Takeover
capabilities.description: Scan for dangling DNS records in Azure DNS zones that could enable subdomain takeover. Checks CNAME records for unclaimed App Service, Blob Storage, CDN, and Traffic Manager names; A/AAAA records for orphaned public IPs; and NS delegations to non-existent Azure DNS zones.

parameters.name: subscription-ids
parameters.description: Azure subscription ID(s) or 'all' to enumerate all accessible subscriptions

capabilities.name: romulus-agent
capabilities.title: Web Exploiter
capabilities.description: Browser-driven web exploiter for SPA / auth-walled targets. Navigates rendered pages, harvests endpoints from network traffic, then tests them directly with curl/python. Files Risks directly via report_new_risk when a chain lands.

capabilities.name: smb-userenum
capabilities.title: SMB User Enumeration
capabilities.description: Enumerates users on exposed SMB servers

capabilities.name: caligula
capabilities.title: caligula
capabilities.description: scans software dependencies for known vulnerabilities, malicious packages, typosquatting, code obfuscation, and supply chain integrity issues

parameters.name: mod
parameters.description: Modules to run: all, deps, malware, iac

parameters.name: aws_region
parameters.description: AWS region for AMI peel calls (mod=iac)

parameters.name: no_peel
parameters.description: Discovery only: skip AMI peel + advisory match (mod=iac)

parameters.name: kev_only_gate
parameters.description: Exit non-zero only on KEV findings (mod=iac)

parameters.name: rpm_manifest
parameters.description: Path to rpm -qa output file for Amazon Linux scanning

capabilities.name: windows-smb-powerhuntshares
capabilities.title: Windows SMB PowerHuntShares
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive SMB share enumeration and access analysis across Active Directory environments. PowerHuntShares discovers accessible network shares, analyzes permissions, identifies potentially sensitive directories, and maps the SMB attack surface within the client's internal network infrastructure.

capabilities.name: gowitness
capabilities.title: Gowitness
capabilities.description: takes screenshots of webpages

capabilities.name: finger-username-enumeration
capabilities.title: Finger Username Enumeration
capabilities.description: Enumerates usernames on a finger server

parameters.name: JANUS_TOOLS
parameters.description: The JANUS_TOOLS environment variable that maps the path to the janus/tools/ directory.

capabilities.name: windows-database-powerupsql-audit
capabilities.title: Windows Database PowerUpSQL Audit
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive SQL Server security auditing using PowerUpSQL's Invoke-SQLAudit functionality. Identifies SQL Server vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, excessive privileges, weak authentication, and security gaps across discovered SQL instances within the client's Active Directory environment. Can audit individual instances or automatically discover and audit all SQL servers in the domain.

parameters.name: Instance
parameters.description: SQL Server instance to audit (e.g., SQLServer1\Instance1). Not required when using DiscoverAndAuditAll.

parameters.name: DiscoverAndAuditAll
parameters.description: Discover all SQL Server instances (local, AD, and linked servers) and audit them all. When enabled, Instance parameter is ignored.

capabilities.name: brutus-agent
capabilities.title: Credential Security Tester
capabilities.description: Specialized agent that discovers authentication services (SSH, RDP, FTP, SMB, etc.) and tests for weak, default, or compromised credentials to demonstrate unauthorized access

capabilities.name: chain-correlator
capabilities.title: Exploit Chain Correlator
capabilities.description: Correlates customer CVE inventories against curated database of in-the-wild desktop exploit chains

capabilities.name: nuclei-dast
capabilities.title: nuclei-dast
capabilities.description: runs Nuclei DAST and generic vulnerability templates against a discovered webpage and emits risks for findings

parameters.name: nuclei-rate-limit
parameters.description: Nuclei requests per second rate limit

capabilities.name: trajan
capabilities.title: trajan
capabilities.description: Scans CI/CD pipelines for security vulnerabilities including injection, supply chain, and permission misconfigurations

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token for the CI/CD platform API

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: CI/CD platform override (auto-detected from URL if omitted). Required for self-hosted platforms: jenkins, jfrog

parameters.name: base_url
parameters.description: Base URL for self-hosted platforms (e.g., https://jenkins.corp.com). Required when platform=jenkins or platform=jfrog

parameters.name: active_mode
parameters.description: Enable active attack execution (disabled by default)

parameters.name: attack_timeout
parameters.description: Timeout in seconds for attack execution

parameters.name: c2_repo
parameters.description: C2 repository for interactive shell and runner-on-runner attacks (e.g., owner/repo)

parameters.name: target_os
parameters.description: Target runner OS for runner-on-runner attacks

parameters.name: target_arch
parameters.description: Target runner architecture for runner-on-runner attacks

parameters.name: runner_labels
parameters.description: Comma-separated runner labels for targeting specific runners

parameters.name: delivery
parameters.description: Delivery method for AI prompt injection attacks

capabilities.name: mssql-login
capabilities.title: MSSQL Login
capabilities.description: Checks MSSQL servers for weak credentials.

parameters.name: JANUS_TOOLS
parameters.description: The JANUS_TOOLS environment variable that maps the path to the janus/tools/ directory.

capabilities.name: linux-ad-bloodhound
capabilities.title: Linux AD BloodHound Data Collector
capabilities.description: Performs Active Directory data collection using BloodHound.py

parameters.name: CollectionMethod
parameters.description: Data collection method to use. Multiple methods can be comma-separated (e.g., Group,LocalAdmin)

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Domain controller IP address or hostname (optional - will auto-discover if not provided)

capabilities.name: subdomain-test
capabilities.description: Test agent for subdomain capability tool validation

capabilities.name: unauth-mqtt-broker
capabilities.title: Unauthenticated MQTT Broker
capabilities.description: Checks MQTT servers for unauthenticated access

capabilities.name: integration-affiliation
capabilities.title: Integration Affiliation Agent
capabilities.description: Determines whether an integration-originated asset still belongs to the user.

capabilities.name: aurelian-aws-list-all
capabilities.title: AWS List All Resources
capabilities.description: List resources in an AWS account using CloudControl API. Supports 'full' scan for all resources or 'summary' scan for key services. Can scan multiple regions concurrently.

parameters.name: profile-dir
parameters.description: Set to override the default AWS profile directory

parameters.name: opsec_level
parameters.description: Operational security level for AWS operations

parameters.name: scan-type
parameters.description: Scan type - 'full' for all resources or 'summary' for key services

capabilities.name: crawler
capabilities.title: Crawler
capabilities.description: Crawls web applications to discover content, enumerate directories, and identify authentication mechanisms

capabilities.name: nuclei
capabilities.title: Nuclei
capabilities.description: scans services for vulnerabilities using nuclei templates across HTTP, TCP, DNS, SSL, and other protocols

parameters.name: test
parameters.description: Nuclei template ID to run (passed to -id). Leave blank to run the default template set.

capabilities.name: postgres-login
capabilities.title: Postgres Login
capabilities.description: Checks PostgreSQL servers for weak credentials.

capabilities.name: correlation-engine
capabilities.title: Batch Correlation Engine
capabilities.description: pages through all correlatable assets and cross-references them against integrated service providers

capabilities.name: vespasian
capabilities.title: vespasian
capabilities.description: discovers API endpoints via headless browser crawling and generates OpenAPI specs

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: Comma-separated auth headers (e.g. Authorization: Bearer tok)

capabilities.name: mysql-login
capabilities.title: MySQL Login
capabilities.description: Checks MySQL servers for weak credentials.

capabilities.name: cidr
capabilities.title: CIDR
capabilities.description: queries CIDR blocks from various regional internet registries

capabilities.name: julius
capabilities.title: Julius
capabilities.description: detects LLM services (Ollama, OpenAI, etc.) on HTTP endpoints

parameters.name: base-paths
parameters.description: Comma-separated path prefixes for probing nonstandard LLM endpoint paths (e.g., /api,/proxy)

capabilities.name: whois
capabilities.title: WHOIS (Domain)
capabilities.description: performs WHOIS lookups for domains and extracts registration information

capabilities.name: bad-dns
capabilities.title: Bad DNS
capabilities.description: A tool to check for subdomain takeover vulnerabilities using baddns.

capabilities.name: windows-ad-group3r
capabilities.title: Windows AD Group3r
capabilities.description: Performs security analysis of Active Directory Group Policy Objects (GPOs) to identify misconfigurations and vulnerabilities. Group3r examines GPO settings, ACLs, script paths, registry modifications, and privilege assignments to discover potential attack vectors, insecure configurations, and opportunities for privilege escalation within the client's AD Group Policy infrastructure.

parameters.name: DomainControllerIP
parameters.description: IP address or hostname of a specific domain controller to connect to

capabilities.name: diana-agent
capabilities.description: Diana — makes read-only API calls to cloud and integration environments (AWS, GitHub, GitLab) via native CLIs

capabilities.name: freeze
capabilities.title: Tenant Burp Teardown
capabilities.description: Pause every Burp site under a frozen tenant's folder and drop folder-level schedules.

capabilities.name: recorder-agent
capabilities.title: Login Recipe Recorder
capabilities.description: Drives a browser-based login against a target with supplied credentials and emits a deterministic webauth recipe (CredentialBlob) that downstream capabilities can replay without an LLM in the loop.

capabilities.name: research-exploiter
capabilities.title: CritFinder Exploit Validator
capabilities.description: Validates approved vulnerability hypotheses through practical exploitation and evidence collection within the CritFinder adversarial research pipeline

capabilities.name: windows-network-nmap
capabilities.title: Windows Network Nmap
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive network reconnaissance and port scanning from Windows environments using Nmap. Identifies open ports, running services, service versions, and potential vulnerabilities across target hosts within the client's network infrastructure. Includes service detection and vulnerability scanning capabilities to map the network attack surface.

parameters.name: custom_ports
parameters.description: Custom port specification when ports is set to 'Custom'. Examples: '80,443', '1-1000', '22,80-90,443'

parameters.name: scan_flags
parameters.description: Additional nmap flags for scanning options. The default value includes service detection, script scanning with default and vuln groups, and skipping Ping for checking if the target host responds.

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output format for Nmap results. Choose from xml (structured XML), text (normal text output), or grep (greppable format).

capabilities.name: linux-ad-adidnsdump
capabilities.title: Linux AD ADIDNSDump
capabilities.description: Enumerates DNS records in Active Directory-integrated DNS zones using ADIDNSDump tool in a containerized Linux environment. This tool queries domain controllers for DNS records stored in Active Directory and provides a comprehensive list that can be used for security assessments and network mapping.

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Domain controller IP address or hostname

capabilities.name: freeze_webapp
capabilities.title: Web Application Burp Freeze
capabilities.description: Pause (or delete) a Burp Enterprise site to mirror a WebApplication's frozen/deleted state. Clears the site's schedule and adds the hostname to folder-wide out_of_scope_url_prefixes to stop cross-site scan spillover.

capabilities.name: template-refinement
capabilities.title: Nuclei Template Refinement
capabilities.description: Refine Nuclei security templates using AI assistance with multi-agent pipeline

capabilities.name: anon-ftp
capabilities.title: Anonymous FTP
capabilities.description: Checks FTP servers for anonymous access and weak credentials.

capabilities.name: dependency-confusion-scanner
capabilities.title: Dependency Confusion
capabilities.description: Scans GitHub repositories for dependency confusion vulnerabilities

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: The file to write the scan results to

parameters.name: GH_TOKEN
parameters.description: GitHub token to use for enumeration

capabilities.name: java-jdwp-enum
capabilities.title: Java JDWP Enum Scanner (NSE)
capabilities.description: Integration of a Java Debug Wire Protocol (JDWP) detection capability using Nmap's jdwp-version NSE script to identify exposed Java debugging services, enabling organizations to discover potentially vulnerable Java applications that could allow remote code execution.

capabilities.name: linux-network-dnsx
capabilities.title: Linux Network dnsx DNS Resolver
capabilities.description: Performs DNS resolution using dnsx, a multi-purpose DNS toolkit from ProjectDiscovery. Supports reverse DNS (PTR) for IP-to-hostname mapping and forward lookups (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS, TXT) for domain reconnaissance. Uses the host's DNS resolvers by default for internal network compatibility.

parameters.name: Resolvers
parameters.description: (Optional) Comma-separated list of custom DNS resolvers. If empty, uses system resolvers from /etc/resolv.conf.

parameters.name: Rate
parameters.description: DNS queries per second rate limit

capabilities.name: linux-ad-umber-collect
capabilities.title: Linux Umber AD Collect
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive Active Directory enumeration and data collection using Umber. Implements a SharpHound-style collection engine that enumerates all AD objects (users, computers, groups, GPOs, OUs, etc.) and collects their properties and relationships. Supports LDAP-only collection or extended collection including network sessions, local group membership, and user rights assignments via RPC.

parameters.name: Domain
parameters.description: Domain where user credentials are valid. If empty, defaults to TargetDomain.

parameters.name: Server
parameters.description: Domain controller address. If empty, auto-discovered via DNS.

parameters.name: CollectAll
parameters.description: Enable all computer collection methods (sessions, local groups, user rights via RPC). If false, only LDAP collection is performed.

capabilities.name: linux-network-segmentation-test
capabilities.title: Linux Network Segmentation Test
capabilities.description: Tests network segmentation by scanning specified IP addresses or CIDR ranges to identify accessible services. Used to validate network isolation and firewall rules by checking if services are reachable from the scanning host. Supports quick scanning (top 100 ports, reports only if services are accessible) and comprehensive scanning (top 1000 ports). All scans use -Pn to skip host discovery and focus on port scanning.

parameters.name: scan_mode
parameters.description: Scan mode: 'quick' (top 100 ports, only reports if accessible services found), 'comprehensive' (top 1000 ports, reports all results), or 'custom' (use custom_ports parameter)

parameters.name: custom_ports
parameters.description: Custom ports to scan (only used when scan_mode is 'custom'). Examples: '80,443', '1-1000', '22,80-90,443', or '-' for all ports

parameters.name: scan_flags
parameters.description: Additional nmap flags for scanning options

capabilities.name: windows-ad-sharphound
capabilities.title: Windows AD Sharphound
capabilities.description: Performs Active Directory data collection using Sharphound, the official data collector for BloodHound. Supports running with the current computer/user context (no credentials required on domain-joined machines) or with explicit credentials. Enumerates domain users, groups, computers, sessions, local admin rights, group memberships, ACLs, and trust relationships to identify potential attack paths and privilege escalation opportunities within Active Directory environments.

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: Domain username for authentication. If empty, uses the current computer/user context.

parameters.name: Password
parameters.description: Domain user password. Required only if Username is specified.

capabilities.name: collect-analytics
capabilities.title: Analytics Lookup
capabilities.description: collects analytics tracking codes from web pages

capabilities.name: hadrian
capabilities.title: Hadrian API Security Testing
capabilities.description: OWASP API security testing against web applications

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Comma-separated test categories to run (e.g. 'bola,bfla' or 'all')

parameters.name: templates
parameters.description: Comma-separated template names to run (empty for all)

parameters.name: roles_file
parameters.description: Roles YAML file (overrides default anonymous role)

capabilities.name: ssh
capabilities.title: SSH
capabilities.description: checks SSH servers for known vulnerabilities

capabilities.name: aurelian-azure-configuration-scan
capabilities.title: Azure Configuration Scan
capabilities.description: Detects Azure configuration issues including weak authentication, disabled RBAC, privilege escalation paths, and overly permissive access rules via Azure Resource Graph.

parameters.name: subscription-ids
parameters.description: Azure subscription ID(s) or 'all' to enumerate all accessible subscriptions

parameters.name: template-dir
parameters.description: Optional directory with additional YAML query templates

capabilities.name: red-team
capabilities.title: Red Team Terraform Operations
capabilities.description: Run Red Team infrastructure terraform plan and apply operations

capabilities.name: aurelian-aws-find-secrets
capabilities.title: AWS Find Secrets
capabilities.description: Enumerates AWS resources via Cloud Control, extracts content likely to contain hardcoded secrets (EC2 user data, Lambda code, CloudFormation templates, CloudWatch logs, ECS task definitions, SSM documents, Step Functions executions), and scans with Titus.

parameters.name: profile-dir
parameters.description: Set to override the default AWS profile directory

parameters.name: opsec_level
parameters.description: Operational security level for AWS operations

parameters.name: disabled-titus-rules
parameters.description: Rule IDs to exclude from scanning

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Validate detected secrets against their source APIs

parameters.name: ignore-file
parameters.description: Path to gitignore-style file for skipping paths; when empty uses a default list

parameters.name: ruleset
parameters.description: Titus ruleset to apply; empty string disables ruleset filtering

parameters.name: max-events
parameters.description: Max log events per log group

parameters.name: max-streams
parameters.description: Max streams to sample per log group

capabilities.name: seneca-agent
capabilities.title: CVE Research Orchestrator
capabilities.description: Specialized agent that orchestrates CVE research capabilities to validate and enrich CVE-based triage findings with exploit intelligence, template generation, and severity assessment

capabilities.name: hunt
capabilities.title: Hunter
capabilities.description: Continuous attack-surface hunt. Selects the next most interesting target, expands the surface when needed, delegates the actual exploit to a scoped subagent, and files the resulting findings.

capabilities.name: azuread-discovery
capabilities.title: Azure AD Discovery
capabilities.description: discovers Azure AD domains and tenants associated with a domain

capabilities.name: resolver
capabilities.title: Resolver
capabilities.description: resolves IP addresses for a domain

capabilities.name: windows-database-powerupsql-domain-discovery
capabilities.title: Windows Database PowerUpSQL Domain Discovery
capabilities.description: Automatically discovers SQL Server instances within Active Directory environments using PowerUpSQL. Queries domain controllers and LDAP to identify registered SQL Server services, instances, and database assets across the client's AD infrastructure, providing comprehensive database inventory for security assessment.

capabilities.name: pius-discovery
capabilities.title: pius-discovery
capabilities.description: discovers domains and CIDRs for an organization using Pius multi-plugin pipeline

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Plugin mode filter: passive, active, or all

parameters.name: censys_api_token
parameters.description: Censys Platform API token (Personal Access Token)

parameters.name: doh_servers
parameters.description: Comma-separated DoH resolver URLs (default: Cloudflare, Google, AdGuard)

parameters.name: doh_gateways
parameters.description: Comma-separated pre-deployed gateway URLs for DoH enumeration

parameters.name: doh_deploy_gateways
parameters.description: Deploy AWS API Gateways as DoH proxies (true/false)

parameters.name: dns_brute_concurrency
parameters.description: Max concurrent DNS queries for dns-brute (default: 50)

parameters.name: google_dorks_max_subsidiaries
parameters.description: Max subsidiaries to resolve via Google dorks (default: 30)

parameters.name: github_token
parameters.description: GitHub personal access token for improved rate limits

capabilities.name: risk-scoring
capabilities.title: Risk Scoring
capabilities.description: Bulk-compute asset risk scores using single graph queries per user

capabilities.name: windows-ad-scriptsentry
capabilities.title: Windows AD ScriptSentry
capabilities.description: Analyzes Active Directory logon scripts for security vulnerabilities and misconfigurations. ScriptSentry identifies dangerous logon scripts with excessive permissions, hardcoded credentials, insecure storage locations, and potential privilege escalation vectors within the client's AD environment, helping prevent script-based attacks and credential exposure.

capabilities.name: confluence-secrets
capabilities.title: Confluence Secrets
capabilities.description: scans Confluence page versions for exposed secrets

capabilities.name: linux-network-recon
capabilities.title: Linux Network Recon
capabilities.description: Performs comprehensive network reconnaissance by chaining port scanning (naabu), service fingerprinting (nerva), and DNS resolution (dnsx). Discovers open ports, identifies running services, and enriches assets with reverse DNS hostnames in a single pipeline.

parameters.name: CustomPorts
parameters.description: Custom port specification when Ports is set to 'Custom'. Examples: '80,443', '1-1000', '22,80-90,443'

parameters.name: ServiceDetect
parameters.description: Run service fingerprinting on discovered ports using nerva

parameters.name: DnsResolve
parameters.description: Run reverse DNS (PTR) lookups on discovered IPs using dnsx to enrich assets with hostnames

parameters.name: ExtraArgs
parameters.description: (Optional) Additional arguments for the active tool

capabilities.name: executive-summary
capabilities.title: Executive Summary Generator
capabilities.description: Generates a tenant-level executive summary PDF with risk posture, asset inventory, and key findings

capabilities.name: email-security
capabilities.title: Email Security
capabilities.description: checks for missing SPF and DMARC records on apex domains

capabilities.name: fingerprint
capabilities.title: Nerva
capabilities.description: Fingerprints an exposed port to enumerate services and CPEs using Nerva
